tasks.name: Grouping sentences into chunks
tasks.description: Divide the text into logical groups (chunks) based on their content relevance and flow.
tasks.expected_output: A list of grouped sentence chunks.

tasks.name: Summarizing each chunk using LLM
tasks.description: Use the language model to summarize individual chunks while maintaining factual accuracy and entity integrity.
tasks.expected_output: A summary of a single chunk.

tasks.name: Merging summaries into one document
tasks.description: Combine the summarized chunks to form an overall tautological text.
tasks.expected_output: A complete summary of the input text.

tasks.name: Refining and adjusting phrasing for clarity
tasks.description: Review and adjust sentences to ensure they are clear, concise, and factually accurate.
tasks.expected_output: A refined summary of the input text.

tasks.name: Verifying claims against original text
tasks.description: Check that all summaries maintain factual accuracy and entity integrity.
tasks.expected_output: Confirmation that each summary is factually accurate.

roadmap.notes: Ensure the final output does not exceed 20% of input length, aiming for a concise yet comprehensive tautological text.
